task: Audit the repository's monitoring-related implementation end-to-end. Focus on node metrics ingestion/display, tunnel metrics ingestion/display, service monitor scheduling/execution, permissions, and monitoring UI. Do research only; do not modify files. Return a concise but specific report with: (1) what monitoring features exist and whether each appears complete, (2) likely correctness issues or edge-case bugs with file references, (3) UX/design shortcomings in the monitoring UI, and (4) any notable test coverage gaps. Use file paths and line numbers where possible.
